text.title: Spatial Accessibility Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: visionOS productivity app — interaction matrix, comfort options, captions, tester mix.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Productivity app for Apple Vision Pro: floating windows + 3D object inspector. Pre-store-submission spatial-a11y audit.

section.title: Resulting report
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. App submission passes Apple a11y review on first attempt. Inspector documented "Mac companion app" as non-spatial fallback for low-vision users who prefer macOS VoiceOver.
